commit.subject: LU-0000 tests: perform recovery-mds-scale on RHEL 7.1
commit.message:
LU-0000 tests: perform recovery-mds-scale on RHEL 7.1

This is for test only.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly alwaysuploadlogs \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes,REQFAIL=100 \
mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs mdsfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
clientdistro=el7 ossdistro=el7 mdsdistro=el7 \
clientcount=4 osscount=2 mdscount=2 mdtcount=1 \
mdssizegb=10 ostsizegb=10 austeroptions=-R failover=true iscsi=1 \
testlist=recovery-mds-scale

Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <jian.yu@intel.com>
Change-Id: Ic4a95d093a0bdb18c6e731eb97a53aa6ef74c3dd
